The '''53rd''' annual '''[[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from February 6–16, 2003.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2003/01_jahresblatt_2003/01_Jahresblatt_2003.html |title=53RD BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL FEBRUARY 6 - 16, 2003 |access-date=9 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131104212926/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2003/01_jahresblatt_2003/01_Jahresblatt_2003.html| archive-date=4 November 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref> The festival opened with [[musical film]] ''[[Chicago (2002 film)|Chicago]]'' by [[Rob Marshall]] and closed with [[Martin Scorsese]]'s ''[[Gangs of New York]]'', both films played out of competition at the festival.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.nytimes.com/2003/02/12/movies/grim-reality-dominates-berlinale-film-festival.html |title=Grim Reality Dominates Berlinale Film Festival |access-date=9 June 2014 |work=[[The New York Times]]|date=12 February 2003 |last1=Riding |first1=Alan }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.filmthreat.com/festivals/1103/ |title=53RD BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL WRAP UP |access-date=9 June 2014 |work=filmthreat |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140714212201/http://www.filmthreat.com/festivals/1103/ |archive-date=2014-07-14 |url-status=dead }}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2003/08_pressemitteilungen_2003/08_Pressemitteilungen_2003-Details_995.html |title=GANGS OF NEW YORK TO BE FINAL FILM OF THE BERLINALE 2003 |access-date=9 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de }}</ref> 

The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to ''[[In This World]]'' directed by [[Michael Winterbottom]].<ref name="PRIZES" />

The retrospective dedicated to German film director [[F. W. Murnau]] was shown at the festival.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html#|title=RETROSPECTIVE|access-date=28 August 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170304113847/http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html|archive-date=4 March 2017|url-status=dead|df=dmy-all}}</ref>

== Juries ==
[[File:Atomegoya.jpg|thumb|239x239px|[[Atom Egoyan]], Jury President]]
The following people were announced as being on the jury for the festival:<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2003/04_jury_2003/04_Jury_2003.html |title=JURIES 2003 |access-date=9 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131023125916/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2003/04_jury_2003/04_Jury_2003.html| archive-date=23 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Atom Egoyan]], Canadian filmmaker and producer - Jury President
* [[Martina Gedeck]], German actress
* [[Anna Galiena]], Italian actress
* [[Kathryn Bigelow]], American filmmaker and producer
* [[Abderrahmane Sissako]], Mauritanian filmmaker
* [[Humbert Balsan]], French actor and producer
* [[Geoffrey Gilmore]], American director of the [[Tribeca Festival|Tribeca Film Festival]]

=== Short Films Competition ===
* [[Andreas Dresen]], German filmmaker
* Phyllis Mollet, French director of communication of the [[FIAPF]]
* Thom Palmen, Swedish director of the Umeå International Film Festival

==Official Awards==

=== Main Competition ===
[[File:Michael Winterbottom (Berlin Film Festival 2009).jpg|thumb|200px|[[Michael Winterbottom]], winner of the [[Golden Bear]] at the festival]]
The following prizes were awarded by the Jury:<ref name="PRIZES">{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2003/03_preistr_ger_2003/03_Preistraeger_2003.html |title=PRIZES & HONOURS 2003|access-date=9 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131015120227/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2003/03_preistr_ger_2003/03_Preistraeger_2003.html| archive-date=15 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/vor_55_ifb/53_IFB_Awards_2003.pdf |title=Awards announcement 2003 2003|access-date=9 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130516044630/http://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/vor_55_ifb/53_IFB_Awards_2003.pdf| archive-date=16 May 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>
*[[Golden Bear]]: ''[[In This World]]'' by [[Michael Winterbottom]]
*[[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize|Silver Bear Jury Grand Prix]]: ''[[Adaptation (film)|Adaptation]]'' by [[Spike Jonze]]
*[[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Patrice Chéreau]] for ''[[His Brother (film)|His Brother]]''
*[[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Sam Rockwell]] for ''[[Confessions of a Dangerous Mind (film)|Confessions of a Dangerous Mind]]''
*[[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Meryl Streep]], [[Nicole Kidman]] and [[Julianne Moore]] for ''[[The Hours (film)|The Hours]]''
*'''Silver Bear for Best Film Music''': Majoly, [[Serge Fiori]] and Maadu Diabaté for ''Madame Brouette''
*'''Silver Bear for Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': [[Li Yang (director)|Yang Li]] for ''[[Blind Shaft]]''

=== Short Film Competition ===
*[[Short Film Golden Bear]]:
**''In Absentia'' by Lucía Cedrón
**''The Tram #9 Was Going'' by Stepan Koval

=== Honorary Golden Bear ===
*[[Anouk Aimée]]

=== Berlinale Camera ===
*[[Artur Brauner]]
*[[Peer Raben]]
*Erika Richter

=== Panorama Audience Award ===
*''[[Broken Wings (2002 film)|Broken Wings]]'' by Nir Bergman

=== Crystal Bear ===
*'''Best Short Film''': ''Pipsqueak Prince'' by Zoia Trofimova
*'''Best Feature Film''': ''[[Elina: As If I Wasn't There]]'' by [[Klaus Härö]]

== Independent Awards ==

=== [[International Federation of Film Critics#FIPRESCI Award|FIPRESCI Award]] ===
*''[[Distant Lights (2003 film)|Distant Lights]]'' by [[Hans-Christian Schmid]]
**'''Special Mention''': ''[[Remake (2003 film)|Remake]]'' by Dino Mustafić
